parameters.query:
select id, recipient_name
from razreshenobot.requests
where id = $1
limit 1;

parameters.command:
=set -e

echo "IN={{$json.inPath}}"
echo "OUT={{$json.outPathLocal}}"

mkdir -p "$(dirname "{{$json.outPathLocal}}")"

/opt/razresheno/venv/bin/python /opt/razresheno/render_doc.py "{{$json.inPath}}"

test -f "{{$json.outPathLocal}}" || (echo "NO_PREVIEW_FILE {{$json.outPathLocal}}" >&2; exit 1)
ls -la "{{$json.outPathLocal}}"

=set -e
mkdir -p "$(dirname "{{$json.outPathCloud}}")"

for i in 1 2 3 4 5; do
  if cp "{{$json.outPathLocal}}" "{{$json.outPathCloud}}" 2>/dev/null; then
    ls -la "{{$json.outPathCloud}}"
    exit 0
  fi
  sleep $((i*i))
done

echo "FAILED_COPY_TO_NEXTCLOUD" >&2
exit 1

=set -e

FILE="{{$json.outPathLocal}}"
CHAT="{{$json.tg_user_id}}"

test -f "$FILE" || (echo "NO_FILE $FILE" >&2; exit 1)

curl -sS -X POST "https://api.telegram.org/bot8738651494:AAEEKr11vSTrb-5y602bhqsyOHWp1sN35x8/sendDocument" \
  -F "chat_id=$CHAT" \
  -F "document=@$FILE" \
  -F "caption=Вариант № {{$json.idx}}" \
  | tee /tmp/tg_send_last.json

=set -e

dir="/mnt/razresheno/templates/backgrounds"

if ls "$dir"/bg*.png >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  for f in "$dir"/bg*.png; do
    basename "$f"
  done
else
  echo ""
fi
